creator: me@falz.net
text:
Update databases/mysql-proxy to 0.8.1. According to MySQL's changelog  
this fixes the issue where mysql.sock isn't properly removed and
hence won't start up without manualr removal
        http://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/5.1/en/mysql-proxy-news.html

patch also available at:
        http://falz.net/static/mysql-proxy-081.diff
